name: Cash Cow Corporation
description_short: Nevada Title and Payday Loans, Inc. (Cash Cow Corporation) offers fast title loans up to $15,000, payday loans, and installment loans with same-day or next-day funding at their Las Vegas location.
description_long:
Cash Cow Corporation operates as Nevada Title and Payday Loans, Inc., a Las Vegas-based lender specializing in short-term and collateral-backed emergency financing. The company is located at 8170 South Eastern Ave, Suite 5 in the Big Lots shopping center, approximately 1 mile east of Exit 8 off the 215 freeway. Operating hours are Monday-Friday 10AM-6PM and Saturday 9AM-1PM. The business serves customers who need rapid access to cash for unexpected expenses.

The company offers three primary loan products: Nevada auto title loans (up to $15,000 based on vehicle value), payday loans for short-term needs between paychecks, and signature installment loans with structured payment plans. Title loans allow customers to borrow against a lien-free vehicle while retaining driving privileges. Payday loans require proof of recent income, valid ID, and an active checking account. Installment loans require ID, a checking account statement, and proof of income. All three products can typically be funded the same business day if processed before 12:00pm EST, or the following business day otherwise. The company accepts online applications that are followed up with phone verification and in-person verification.

Cash Cow Corporation distinguishes itself through several operational features: no income requirement for title loans (qualification based solely on vehicle value), an in-person local store associate to explain paperwork and walk customers through the process, quick vehicle inspection and same-day funding capability, and an online request form available anytime. The company explicitly markets itself as serving customers with bad credit and those facing urgent financial situations.

However, potential borrowers should recognize that this is a high-cost lending model. Title loans and payday loans typically carry APRs far exceeding 36%, making them expensive emergency options suitable only for truly urgent, short-term situations. The company's business model depends on customers using these products repeatedly, and the lack of income verification for title loans suggests higher risk pricing. While the convenience and speed are genuine advantages, the cost of capital is substantially higher than alternatives like credit union PALs, employer advances, or personal loans.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No income documentation required for title loans—qualification based on vehicle value only
Up to $15,000 available on title loans, substantially higher than typical payday loan limits
Keep your vehicle while repaying—title is held as collateral but driving is permitted
Same-day funding available for applications submitted before 12:00pm EST
In-person store associate walks customers through paperwork before signing
Multiple loan types available (title, payday, installment) for different financial situations
Online application available 24/7 with phone follow-up from store associate
cons: High-cost lending products with APRs typically exceeding 100% for payday loans and title loans, significantly more expensive than personal loans or credit union alternatives
No transparency on website regarding APR, terms, or payment schedules—customers must call or visit in-person to learn actual costs
Business model incentivizes repeat borrowing; customers caught in cycles pay far more than principal borrowed
Vehicle title held as collateral creates risk of repossession if payments missed
Limited to Las Vegas single location; no online funding or remote service expansion mentioned
best_for: Vehicle owners with paid-off cars facing immediate cash emergencies who cannot access other credit
Salaried or hourly employees needing short-term bridge loans between paychecks for urgent bills
Consumers with damaged credit unable to qualify for personal loans, credit cards, or bank loans
Borrowers in need of loans within hours rather than days who can afford high interest rates
diagnosis: Cash Cow Corporation is best for vehicle owners or salaried employees in genuine financial emergencies who need cash within hours and cannot access lower-cost alternatives. The primary caveat is cost: these are among the most expensive consumer loans available, with triple-digit APRs making them suitable only for short-term emergencies, not ongoing financial needs or larger purchases. Customers should exhaust credit union PALs, employer advances, and personal loans before using title or payday products.
services: Nevada auto title loans up to $15,000 based on vehicle evaluation
Las Vegas payday loans for short-term cash needs
Signature installment loans with structured repayment plans
Online title loan request forms available anytime
Same-day funding for applications processed before 12:00pm EST
Next-business-day funding for applications after 12:00pm EST
Phone consultation and application verification with store associates
In-person paperwork explanation and guidance before signing
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8170 S Eastern Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89123
meta_description: Cash Cow Corporation offers title loans up to $15,000, payday loans, and installment loans with same-day or next-day funding.
